mapper.sql: notification_id, receiver_user_id, notification_type, title, content, related_biz_type, related_biz_id, read_flag, send_time, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification_info ( receiver_user_id, notification_type, title, content, related_biz_type, related_biz_id, read_flag, send_time, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{receiverUserId}, #{notificationType}, #{title}, #{content}, #{relatedBizType}, #{relatedBizId}, #{readFlag}, #{sendTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted} )
mapper.update: UPDATE notification_info SET receiver_user_id = #{receiverUserId}, notification_type = #{notificationType}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, related_biz_type = #{relatedBizType}, related_biz_id = #{relatedBizId}, read_flag = #{readFlag}, send_time = #{sendTime}, update_time = #{updateTime}, deleted = #{deleted} WHERE notification_id = #{notificationId}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM notification_info WHERE notification_id = #{notificationId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM notification_info WHERE receiver_user_id = #{receiverUserId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY send_time DESC, notification_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE notification_info SET read_flag = 1, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE receiver_user_id = #{receiverUserId} AND read_flag = 0 AND deleted = 0
